ConvertRecoveryPointToSnapshot.description: Grants permission to convert a recovery point to a snapshot

CreateCustomDomainAssociation.description: Grants permission to create a custom domain association in Amazon Redshift Serverless

CreateEndpointAccess.description: Grants permission to create an Amazon Redshift Serverless managed VPC endpoint

CreateNamespace.description: Grants permission to create an Amazon Redshift Serverless namespace

CreateReservation.description: Grants permission to purchase a capacity reservation according to a specific reservation offering, for a specified number of RPUs

CreateScheduledAction.description: Grants permission to create a scheduled action for a specified Amazon Redshift Serverless namespace

CreateSnapshot.description: Grants permission to create a snapshot of all databases in a namespace

CreateSnapshotCopyConfiguration.description: Grants permission to create a snapshot copy configuration for a specified Amazon Redshift Serverless namespace

CreateUsageLimit.description: Grants permission to create a usage limit for a specified Amazon Redshift Serverless usage type

CreateWorkgroup.description: Grants permission to create a workgroup in Amazon Redshift Serverless

DeleteCustomDomainAssociation.description: Grants permission to delete a custom domain association

DeleteEndpointAccess.description: Grants permission to delete an Amazon Redshift Serverless managed VPC endpoint

DeleteNamespace.description: Grants permission to delete a namespace from Amazon Redshift Serverless

DeleteResourcePolicy.description: Grants permission to delete the specified resource policy

DeleteScheduledAction.description: Grants permission to delete a scheduled action from Amazon Redshift Serverless

DeleteSnapshot.description: Grants permission to delete a snapshot from Amazon Redshift Serverless

DeleteSnapshotCopyConfiguration.description: Grants permission to delete a snapshot copy configuration for a Amazon Redshift Serverless namespace

DeleteUsageLimit.description: Grants permission to delete a usage limit from Amazon Redshift Serverless

DeleteWorkgroup.description: Grants permission to delete a workgroup

DescribeOneTimeCredit.description: Grants permission to see on the Amazon Redshift Serverless console the remaining number of free trial credits and their expiration date

GetCredentials.description: Grants permission to get a database user name and temporary password with temporary authorization to log on to Amazon Redshift Serverless

GetCustomDomainAssociation.description: Grants permission to get information about a specific custom domain association

GetEndpointAccess.description: Grants permission to create an Amazon Redshift Serverless managed VPC endpoint

GetIdentityCenterAuthToken.description: Grants permission to get an authorized token for Identity Center users to access Redshift Serverless workgroups

GetManagedWorkgroup.description: Grants permission to create a Amazon Redshift Managed Serverless workgroup with the specified configuration settings

GetNamespace.description: Grants permission to get information about a namespace in Amazon Redshift Serverless

GetRecoveryPoint.description: Grants permission to get information about a recovery point

GetReservation.description: Grants permission to get a particular reservation object

GetReservationOffering.description: Grants permission to get a particular reservation offering

GetResourcePolicy.description: Grants permission to get a resource policy

GetScheduledAction.description: Grants permission to get information about a specific scheduled action

GetSnapshot.description: Grants permission to get information about a specific snapshot

GetTableRestoreStatus.description: Grants permission to get table restore status about a specific snapshot

GetTrack.description: Grants permission to get information about a track in Amazon Redshift Serverless

GetUsageLimit.description: Grants permission to get information about a usage limit in Amazon Redshift Serverless

GetWorkgroup.description: Grants permission to get information about a specific workgroup

ListAutonomicsDenylist.description: Grants permission to list the resources that are denylisted from global autonomics decisions for a specified workgroup

ListCustomDomainAssociations.description: Grants permission to list custom domain associations in Amazon Redshift Serverless

ListEndpointAccess.description: Grants permission to list EndpointAccess objects and relevant information

ListManagedWorkgroups.description: Grants permission to list managed workgroups in Amazon Redshift Serverless

ListNamespaces.description: Grants permission to list namespaces in Amazon Redshift Serverless

ListRecoveryPoints.description: Grants permission to list an array of recovery points

ListReservationOfferings.description: Grants permission to list all available capacity reservation offerings

ListReservations.description: Grants permission to list all reservations

ListScheduledActions.description: Grants permission to list scheduled actions

ListSnapshotCopyConfigurations.description: Grants permission to list SnapshotCopyConfiguration objects and relevant information

ListTableRestoreStatus.description: Grants permission to list table restore status

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list the tags assigned to a resource

ListTracks.description: Grants permission to list tracks available in Amazon Redshift Serverless

ListUsageLimits.description: Grants permission to list all usage limits within Amazon Redshift Serverless

ListWorkgroups.description: Grants permission to list workgroups in Amazon Redshift Serverless

PutResourcePolicy.description: Grants permission to create or update a resource policy

RestoreFromRecoveryPoint.description: Grants permission to restore the data from a recovery point

RestoreFromSnapshot.description: Grants permission to restore a namespace from a snapshot

RestoreTableFromRecoveryPoint.description: Grants permission to restore a table from a recovery point

RestoreTableFromSnapshot.description: Grants permission to restore a table from a snapshot

TagResource.description: Grants permission to assign one or more tags to a resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove a tag or set of tags from a resource

UpdateAutonomicsDenylist.description: Grants permission to add or remove resources from the global autonomics denylist for a specified workgroup

UpdateCustomDomainAssociation.description: Grants permission to update a certificate associated with a custom domain

UpdateEndpointAccess.description: Grants permission to update an Amazon Redshift Serverless managed VPC endpoint

UpdateNamespace.description: Grants permission to update a namespace with the specified configuration settings

UpdateScheduledAction.description: Grants permission to update a scheduled action

UpdateSnapshot.description: Grants permission to update a snapshot

UpdateSnapshotCopyConfiguration.description: Grants permission to update a snapshot copy configuration for a Amazon Redshift Serverless namespace

UpdateUsageLimit.description: Grants permission to update a usage limit in Amazon Redshift Serverless

UpdateWorkgroup.description: Grants permission to update an Amazon Redshift Serverless workgroup with the specified configuration settings

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the tag keys that are passed in the request

redshift-serverless:endpointAccessId.description: Filters access by the endpoint access identifier

redshift-serverless:managedWorkgroupName.description: Filters access by the managed workgroup identifier

redshift-serverless:namespaceId.description: Filters access by the namespace identifier

redshift-serverless:recoveryPointId.description: Filters access by the recovery point identifier

redshift-serverless:snapshotId.description: Filters access by the snapshot identifier

redshift-serverless:tableRestoreRequestI.description: Filters access by the table restore request identifier

redshift-serverless:workgroupId.description: Filters access by the workgroup identifier
